ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locomotives" (
  "loco_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each locomotive */,
  "loco_name" TEXT /* Name of the locomotive */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the locomotive */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the locomotive */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the locomotive */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the locomotive was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the locomotive was last updated */,
  "scale" TEXT /* Scale of the locomotive (e.g., HO, N, O) */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the locomotive was manufactured */,
  "locomotive_type" TEXT /* Type of locomotive (e.g., steam, diesel, electric) */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the locomotive (e.g., hobbyist club, museum) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the locomotive (e.g., active, maintenance, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loco_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "loco_id" INTEGER /* ID of the locomotive the setting belongs to */,
  "bit" INTEGER /* Bit value of the setting */,
  "dec" INTEGER /* Decimal value of the setting */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration function */,
  "setting_value" INTEGER /* Value of the setting (0 or 1) */,
  "meaning" TEXT /* Meaning of the setting value */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was last updated */,
  "default_value" INTEGER /* Default value of the setting */,
  "is_firmware_dependent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the setting is dependent on firmware */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value the setting can take */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value the setting can take */,
  "is_modifiable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the setting can be modified by users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_loco_id FOREIGN KEY ("loco_id") REFERENCES locomotives ("loco_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hobbyist, staff, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_locomotive_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "loco_id" INTEGER /* ID of the locomotive */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  "access_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's access to the locomotive expires */,
  "is_revoked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's access has been revoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_locomotive_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_locomotive_access_loco_id FOREIGN KEY ("loco_id") REFERENCES locomotives ("loco_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locomotive_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "loco_id" INTEGER /* ID of the locomotive */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., configuration change, start, stop, maintenance) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user performing the action */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locomotive_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locomotive_logs_loco_id FOREIGN KEY ("loco_id") REFERENCES locomotives ("loco_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locomotive_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "loco_id" INTEGER /* ID of the locomotive */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the changes in the version */,
  "is_released" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version is released */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locomotive_versions_loco_id FOREIGN KEY ("loco_id") REFERENCES locomotives ("loco_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change history entry */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version in which the change was made */,
  "old_value" INTEGER /* Old value of the setting */,
  "new_value" INTEGER /* New value of the setting */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the changes made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user making the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES locomotive_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES configuration_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locomotive_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "loco_id" INTEGER /* ID of the locomotive */,
  "current_speed" INTEGER /* Current speed of the locomotive */,
  "current_direction" TEXT /* Current direction of travel (FWD or REV) */,
  "is_running" INTEGER /* Whether the locomotive is currently running */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the status was last updated */,
  "last_known_speed" INTEGER /* Last known speed of the locomotive */,
  "last_known_direction" TEXT /* Last known direction of travel */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the locomotive */,
  "last_known_event" TEXT /* Last known event related to the locomotive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locomotive_status_loco_id FOREIGN KEY ("loco_id") REFERENCES locomotives ("loco_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locomotive_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "loco_id" INTEGER /* ID of the locomotive */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., issue, maintenance, inspection) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the event */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the event was resolved */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the event is assigned */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the resolution of the event */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the event is recurring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locomotive_events_loco_id FOREIGN KEY ("loco_id") REFERENCES locomotives ("loco_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locomotive_events_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locomotive_events_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locomotive_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "loco_id" INTEGER /* ID of the locomotive */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., manual, maintenance log) */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "doc_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the document is confidential */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level required to view the document (e.g., public, private, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locomotive_documents_loco_id FOREIGN KEY ("loco_id") REFERENCES locomotives ("loco_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locomotive_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
